title: B1 Listening Part 1 - Test 47
instructions: For each question, listen to the short recording and choose the correct picture: A, B or C.

questions.context: You hear two people talking about a lost sports bag.
questions.audio_script: Woman: Did you find your sports bag? You sounded worried this morning. || Man: Yes, but not where I expected. I went back to the changing room, because I remembered getting ready for the match. || Woman: And did you check the train platform? You were there later. || Man: I did, but it was not there. Then my driver called and said [1]my sports bag was in the teacher's car[/1]. I must have left it there without thinking. || Woman: Good. You would need it today. || Man: Exactly, so I will collect it soon.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: Did you find your sports bag? You sounded worried this morning.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: Yes, but not where I expected. I went back to the changing room, because I remembered getting ready for the match.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: And did you check the train platform? You were there later.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: I did, but it was not there. Then my driver called and said my sports bag was in the teacher's car. I must have left it there without thinking.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: Good. You would need it today.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: Exactly, so I will collect it soon.

questions.question: Where is the sports bag?

A.imagePrompt: Simple Cambridge exam illustration style, sports bag in the back of a car, no text or labels, flat educational drawing, black and white line art, minimal details, clean white background.

B.imagePrompt: Simple Cambridge exam illustration style, sports bag on a changing room bench, no text or labels, flat educational drawing, black and white line art, minimal details, clean white background.

C.imagePrompt: Simple Cambridge exam illustration style, sports bag on a train platform, no text or labels, flat educational drawing, black and white line art, minimal details, clean white background.

questions.explanation: The speaker says my sports bag was in the teacher's car.

questions.context: You hear two friends making plans for the afternoon.
questions.audio_script: Man: Are we still going to watch the football match this afternoon? I was looking forward to it. || Woman: I don't think so. The match starts too late, so that plan will not work. || Man: We could go to the library instead. || Woman: I checked, but it closes at four. My cousin suggested another idea, and [1]we are practising music after school[/1]. || Man: That sounds fine. What time shall we meet? || Woman: Let's meet at four outside the station, and we can go together. || Woman: That should make the rest of the day much easier.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: Are we still going to watch the football match this afternoon? I was looking forward to it.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: I don't think so. The match starts too late, so that plan will not work.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: We could go to the library instead.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: I checked, but it closes at four. My cousin suggested another idea, and we are practising music after school.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: That sounds fine. What time shall we meet?

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: Let's meet at four outside the station, and we can go together.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: That should make the rest of the day much easier.

questions.question: What are the friends going to do?

A.imagePrompt: Simple Cambridge exam illustration style, friends watching football, no text or labels, flat educational drawing, black and white line art, minimal details, clean white background.

B.imagePrompt: Simple Cambridge exam illustration style, friends playing instruments in a room, no text or labels, flat educational drawing, black and white line art, minimal details, clean white background.

C.imagePrompt: Simple Cambridge exam illustration style, friends studying in a library, no text or labels, flat educational drawing, black and white line art, minimal details, clean white background.

questions.context: You hear two students talking about the cooking class.
questions.audio_script: Man: What do we need to take for the cooking class tomorrow? I don't want to carry too much. || Woman: The teacher said we do not need to bring a notebook, because they have enough for everybody. || Man: What about an apron? || Woman: No, not this time. The important thing is this: [1]bring a plastic box because we can take the cakes home afterwards[/1]. || Man: Thanks. I will put it in my bag tonight. || Woman: Good idea. We have to leave early, so do not forget it.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: What do we need to take for the cooking class tomorrow? I don't want to carry too much.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: The teacher said we do not need to bring a notebook, because they have enough for everybody.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: What about an apron?

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: No, not this time. The important thing is this: bring a plastic box because we can take the cakes home afterwards.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: Thanks. I will put it in my bag tonight.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: Good idea. We have to leave early, so do not forget it.

questions.explanation: The student is told to bring a plastic box because we can take the cakes home afterwards.

questions.context: You hear two people choosing food in a café.
questions.audio_script: Woman: Have you decided what to get for lunch? The queue is moving quickly. || Man: I first thought about salmon, but it is sold out. || Woman: The cheese toastie looks good too. || Man: Maybe, but I need a proper meal. I think [1]I will have the beef pie because it is today's special[/1]. || Woman: Good choice. I will order after you. || Man: Great, then we can find a table near the window before it gets busy. || Man: That should make the rest of the day much easier.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: Have you decided what to get for lunch? The queue is moving quickly.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: I first thought about salmon, but it is sold out.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: The cheese toastie looks good too.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: Maybe, but I need a proper meal. I think I will have the beef pie because it is today's special.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: Good choice. I will order after you.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: Great, then we can find a table near the window before it gets busy.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: That should make the rest of the day much easier.

questions.context: You hear a school announcement about the drama practice.
questions.audio_script: Speaker: This is a message for students joining the drama practice today. Please do not go to the stage, because workers are fixing the lights. Some students may wait by the music room, but a band is using it. The teacher has changed the room for today only. [1]Everyone should go straight to the classroom four after lunch[/1]. Please arrive on time, because the activity will begin as soon as the register is checked. You do not need to bring any extra equipment.

dialogue.speaker: speaker
dialogue.text: This is a message for students joining the drama practice today. Please do not go to the stage, because workers are fixing the lights. Some students may wait by the music room, but a band is using it. The teacher has changed the room for today only. Everyone should go straight to the classroom four after lunch. Please arrive on time, because the activity will begin as soon as the register is checked. You do not need to bring any extra equipment.

questions.context: You hear two people talking about travelling to the hospital.
questions.audio_script: Woman: How are you getting to the hospital tomorrow? I thought you were going to go by bike. || Man: I was, but I do not want to ride in traffic. || Woman: Could you use the bus instead? || Man: I checked, but it stops at the wrong entrance. [1]I am going to take the taxi because it can take me to the main door[/1]. || Woman: That sounds sensible. I will meet you near the entrance when you arrive. || Man: Great. I will send a message if I am late.

questions.context: You hear two people talking about work in a library.
questions.audio_script: Man: What are you doing at the library this afternoon? I thought the manager asked you to repair computers. || Woman: Not now, because a technician is coming. || Man: So will you read to children? || Woman: No, that starts tomorrow. The manager said [1]my job today is to put returned books away[/1]. || Man: That sounds clear enough. || Woman: Yes, and it should not take too long if the shop stays quiet. I can help you afterwards. || Woman: That should make the rest of the day much easier. || Woman: Please remember this, because there may not be another message.
